title: ESP32-WROOM reads a 5 V sensor output
prompt: My ESP32-WROOM-32 board needs to read an analog sensor whose output swings all the way up to 5 V, but the ESP32 ADC pins only tolerate up to 3.3 V. Add a front-end so the full 5 V range of the sensor lands safely inside the ADC's range on one of its analog inputs, and read it periodically.
